DESCRIPTION: Serverless Data Stack: Best practices: Hybrid Tables for operational workloads (index-based reads, row locking, CTAS for bulk load), Native JSON/VARIANT for semi-structured data, X-Small Multi-Cluster warehouse for operational queries, separate analytical warehouse for isolation, Serverless Tasks for auto-scaling transforms.
